ohtani.title: Andy Pages' three-homer day leads Dodgers to win
ohtani.blurb: Andy Pages' three-homer day leads the Dodgers to a 12-2 win over the Astros

imanaga.title: Happ, Imanaga lead Cubs to 2-0 win
imanaga.blurb: Ian Happ crushes a home run and Shota Imanaga strikes out five in seven scoreless frames, leading the Cubs to a 2-0 win over the D-backs

suzuki.title: PCA's clutch homer thwarts Reds' comeback in 7-6 win
suzuki.blurb: A clutch game-tying two-run homer from Pete Crow-Armstrong and an extra-innings Michael Busch walk-off walk sealed the deal in the Cubs' 7-6 win over the Reds

yoshida.title: Sonny Gray's scoreless outing leads Red Sox to win
yoshida.blurb: Sonny Gray tosses five scoreless innings and Caleb Durbin hits an RBI double to lead the Red Sox to a 4-0 win over the Tigers

okamoto.title: Kevin Cash recaps McClanahan's start, more in win
okamoto.blurb: Kevin Cash discusses Shane McClanahan's strong outing against the Blue Jays, how well the Rays have been playing as of lately, Ian Seymour's first save and more

murakami.title: d'Arnaud, Ureña lead Angels to an 8-2 win
murakami.blurb: Travis d'Arnaud crushes a three-run homer and Walbert Ureña tosses six strong innings, leading the Angels to an 8-2 win over the White Sox
